name: Dr. Steven Tijerina, PT, DPT, Cert. MDT
bio: Dr. Steven Tijerina is the US Director of Integrated Pelvic Care (IPC), a clinical network specializing in pelvic-floor physical therapy and men's pelvic health. He is certified in Mechanical Diagnosis and Therapy (Cert. MDT) and reviews IPC patient-education materials for clinical accuracy.
